# New Layout Protocol — Sign-off Checklist

**Date:** 2026-06-07  
**Scope:** First-time invoice layout workflow — detect novelty before Document Review, early AI, forced DR pause, postExtract force, verify-time Auto Seed.

## Locked decisions

| # | Decision |
|---|----------|
| 1 | Document Review: confirm macro class is enough (no template picker at gate) |
| 2 | Early AI before Document Review (after PreReviewClassify) |
| 3 | Auto Seed uses final operator position (verified bbox + corrected value) |
| 4 | Whole batch pauses at DR when any doc is new layout; UI shows only docs needing action |
| 5 | Known layouts follow process `DocumentReviewAutoPauseMode` |

## Implementation summary

| Component | Change |
|-----------|--------|
| `PreReviewClassifyStepType` + `PreReviewClassificationService` | Probe + scoped schmear before DR; sets `IsNewLayout` |
| `AiCorpusExtract` (`preReview`) | Schmear-gated early AI on new layouts only |
| `DocumentReviewStepType` | `IsNewLayout` override pauses batch even when `Never` |
| `AiCorpusExtract` (`postExtract`) | `IsNewLayout` forces postExtract + corpus replay |
| `CorpusLayoutSeedingOrchestrator` | Pipeline seed defers when `IsNewLayout`; verify release seeds from verified results |
| `DocumentsController.Verify` | Calls `SeedFromVerifiedDocumentAsync`, clears `IsNewLayout`, audit `Auto[...truncated, total 9231 chars]s/Parsely_NewLayoutProtocol_E2E_Manual_Ops_Prompt.md) on BEAST. Evidence: [`scripts/new_layout_e2e_evidence.sql`](../../scripts/new_layout_e2e_evidence.sql). Then DM doc-merge via [E2E DM prompt](../build-prompts/ai-self-training/prompts/Parsely_NewLayoutProtocol_E2E_DM_Prompt.md).

**Global indicators at time of check:**

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| AI-seeded locators | 196 |
| Active Zone locators | 183 |
| IsNewLayout=1 docs | 0 |
| AutoSeedFromVerify audits | 0 |

```

# Auto Seed Wiring — Sign-off

**Date:** 2026-06-07  
**Environment:** WIN-SQL002 / `Parsely`  
**Process:** Invoice (`27900FAD-7BFD-48FF-85E7-C6F18C149521`)

## Verdict

| Question | Result |
|----------|--------|
| Is Auto Seed implemented in code? | **PASS** — `AutoSeedFromCorpusStepType` registered; `CorpusLayoutSeedingOrchestrator` + verify hook in `DocumentsController.Verify` |
| Is Invoice pipeline JSON wired? | **PASS** — `AutoSeedFromCorpus` is terminal step **after** `Validate` (Step 3.4 order) |
| Path A — known layout pipeline seed | **PASS** (SQL + unit tests) — `IsNewLayout=0` docs with page-1 corpus; 196 `AI-seeded%` locators in DB |
| Path B — new layout verify seed | **PASS** (unit tests) — pipeline defers; verify path writes `AutoSeedFromVerify` audit; **0 production verify audits yet** (no `IsNewLayout=1` docs in DB at sign-off time) |

**Bottom line:** Auto Seed **is wired to run** when the batch walk reaches the terminal step (known layouts) or when an operator releases a new-layout document from validation. No background job.

---

| 3 | PreClassificationProbe | Not full New Layout Protocol (`PreReviewClassify`[...truncated, total 5287 chars]l

```

---
